name: orchestra
description: Multi-AI 협업 오케스트레이션 — Claude Code Opus 4.7이 지휘자가 되어 본인(Performer)과 ChatGPT Pro Deep Research(Reviewer)를 조율해 하나의 결과물을 도출. /orchestra 명령으로 6단계 워크플로(Brief → Plan Research → Research × N → Synthesize → Review → Decide) 실행.

execution_mode.title: Execution mode
execution_mode.description: browser (default, uses ChatGPT subscription via Playwright) | manual (paste prompts yourself) — api/hybrid modes planned for v0.4+

browser_profile_dir.title: Browser profile directory
browser_profile_dir.description: Persistent Playwright profile directory for ChatGPT login (default: ~/.orchestra/chrome-profile/)

headless.title: Headless browser
headless.description: Run Playwright without visible browser UI. Disable to handle 2FA/CAPTCHA manually.

pass_threshold.title: Reviewer pass threshold
pass_threshold.description: Score below this triggers REVISE even if reviewer says PASS

openai_api_key.title: Optional OpenAI API key
openai_api_key.description: Reserved for future API/hybrid execution mode (v0.4+)

anthropic_api_key.title: Optional Anthropic API key
anthropic_api_key.description: Reserved for future SDK reliability mode (v0.4+)
